sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n51676" key="kaqaplo/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καθαπλόω</orth>, <sense id="n51676.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">spread over</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τοῦ αὐχένος</foreign>, of the hair, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4000.tlg001:2:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aristaenet.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.4</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
